mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS id, COALESCE(sa.total_periods, 0) AS total_periods, COALESCE(sa.attended, 0) AS attended, COALESCE(sa.attendance_rate, 0) AS attendance_rate, sa.last_update FROM student s LEFT JOIN student_attendance_summary sa ON s.id = sa.student_id WHERE s.id = #{studentId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
INSERT INTO student_attendance_summary (student_id, total_periods, attended, attendance_rate, last_update) SELECT s.id AS student_id,
-- 总课时数：固定为课程表中所有课程的课时总和（即 320） (SELECT SUM(course_number) FROM course_schedule) AS total_periods,
-- 实际出勤：统计该学生“出勤(PRESENT)”的唯一节次次数（日期+节次去重） COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT a3.attendance_date, a3.period FROM attendance_record a3 WHERE a3.student_id = s.id AND a3.status = 'PRESENT' ) t ), 0) AS attended,
-- 出勤率：避免除零，按上面两个值计算 CASE WHEN COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cs2.course_number) FROM course_schedule cs2 WHERE cs2.id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT a2.course_id FROM attendance_record a2 WHERE a2.student_id = s.id ) ), 0) > 0 THEN ROUND( COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT a3.attendance_date, a3.period FROM attendance_record a3 WHERE a3.student_id = s.id AND a3.status = 'PRESENT' ) t ), 0) / COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cs2.course_number) FROM course_schedule cs2 WHERE cs2.id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT a2.course_id FROM attendance_record a2 WHERE a2.student_id = s.id ) ), 0) * 100, 2 ) ELSE 0 END AS attendance_rate,
NOW() AS last_update FROM student s -- 注意：不在主查询里联接 attendance_record / course_schedule，避免重复行导致的膨胀 GROUP BY s.id ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_periods = VALUES(total_periods), attended = VALUES(attended), attendance_rate = VALUES(attendance_rate), last_update = NOW();
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM student_attendance_summary WHERE DATE(last_update) = CURDATE()
